Key defender Cuti Romero's Achilles rupture (announced within the last day) and striker Lautaro Martínez's recurring calf strain sidelined him for weeks, softening odds from prior peaks but not eroding the talent gap. Algeria, at 11.5%, draws respect for coach Vladimir Petković's tactical setup—praised by Lionel Scaloni—and recent Africa Cup of Nations form, yet faces historical deficit (sole prior meeting: 4-3 Argentina friendly win in 2007). Draw pricing at 19% reflects group-stage caution in neutral-site matchup amid Algeria's own absences like goalkeeper Anthony Mandréa (shoulder).

markets.question: Will Kaitlin Purrington be the Republican nominee for AZ-01?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Republican Party to contest the AZ-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Republican primary will take place on August 4, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Republican sources, including https://www.rnc.org/.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices former NFL kicker and Trump-endorsed Jay Feely as a heavy 71.5% favorite to win Arizona's open AZ-01 Republican primary on July 21, reflecting his high name recognition, fundraising momentum, and President Trump's January dual endorsement alongside Gina Swoboda, despite her low odds. State Rep. Joseph Chaplik, who resigned from the legislature in February to focus on the race, holds 21.6% after a NextGen Polling survey (April 13-16) showed him leading 24%-15% ballot test among likely GOP primary voters, with 54% undecided and his +20% net approval topping Feely's +8%; traders appear skeptical of the poll amid high uncertainty. Other candidates trail far behind with fragmented support.

markets.question: Will Russia capture all of Pokrovsk by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if, according to the ISW map, Russia captures the entirety of Pokrovsk, Donetsk Oblast, (48.303080° N, 37.192568° E) by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET.

Pokrovsk will be considered captured if the entirety of the municipality is shaded red on the ISW map (https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/36a7f6a6f5a9448496de641cf64bd375) by the resolution date. If the area is not shaded red by the resolution date, the market will resolve to “No”.

For any change on the ISW map to qualify for this market’s resolution, the relevant shading indicating Russian control must persist through the next full ISW daily update cycle. If ISW skips a day, shading must persist until the next finalized ISW update is published, regardless of the date. Any continuous shading which reflects either “Assessed Russian Control”, “Assessed Russian Advance In Ukraine”, or “Assessed Russian Gains in the Past 24 Hours” will qualify. “Assessed Russian Infiltration Areas in Ukraine” will not qualify.

The territory of the municipality is shaded in light grey and is distinguished from bordering municipalities with a darker grey line. If all area within the municipality is shaded in red, however, the shading does not precisely match up with the border such that there is a tiny amount of grey along the border of the city, this will still qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

Once Russia captures the entirety of the specified area, any subsequent loss of control will not be considered towards the resolution of this market.

Location on Google maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/rwDQehLsZAUsquVX7

The primary resolution source for this market will be the ISW Ukraine map. If the ISW map is rendered unavailable, information from DeepStateMap (https://deepstatemap.live/) may be used. If information from both the ISW and DeepStateMap are rendered permanently unavailable, a consensus of credible reporting may be used.

Note: Any temporary glitches or errors in the map will not be considered.

If Russia comes into control of this territory as a result of a negotiated settlement, this will qualify for a 'Yes' resolution, regardless of whether it is shaded red in the ISW map. An announcement of a negotiated settlement that gives Russia de jure control will not qualify. Actual control must be established.

eventMetadata.context_description: Russian forces continue high-tempo assaults and small-unit infiltrations northwest and southwest of Pokrovsk in Donetsk Oblast, but ISW assessments on April 27-28 confirm no advances amid Ukrainian repels by the 7th Rapid Reaction Corps using drone strikes and artillery. Logistical strains limit Russian supply to forward troops, while Ukrainian forces hold northern outskirts and conduct counterpressure near Hryshyne and Rodynske. Following a reported partial seizure of Pokrovsk in late February after two years of fighting, full control remains elusive per geolocated footage and frontline clashes exceeding 100 daily in the sector. Traders watch ISW maps for resolution criteria, with U.S. aid flows and seasonal weather as potential catalysts for shifts.

markets.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be between $74,000 and $76,000 on April 29?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".

events.title: Caracas FC vs. Racing Club
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Copa Sudamericana game, scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026 between Caracas FC and Racing Club.

eventMetadata.context_description: Racing Club enters as trader consensus favorite at 56% implied probability in this Copa Sudamericana Group E clash at Estadio Olímpico de la UCV, buoyed by superior squad depth and attacking output—69 shots and seven goals across their last five matches—despite an irregular run of form marked by a recent 1-1 league draw against Barracas Central. Key absences from that game exacerbate concerns: forward Adrián "Maravilla" Martínez sidelined by a right knee sprain and midfielder Santiago Sosa out with a quadriceps overload, both ruled unfit for travel to Venezuela. Caracas FC, holding 18% odds, leverages home advantage and solid recent results—winning half their last six outings—to fuel upset potential, while the 26% draw price reflects tight defenses and Racing's five straight games conceding.

markets.question: Will Doja Cat have a #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any song by the listed artist is the number 1 song in any official weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs chart released for a data collection reference period entirely between January 1 and December 31, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Any song released with the listed artist as a primary artist will count, including songs released before 2026. If a song is released jointly by multiple artists credited equally as primary artists, it will count for all of them. Features, writing credits, production credits, or other forms of non-primary contributions to a song will not count. Artist attribution will be determined solely by the artists displayed by Billboard on the relevant chart.

Billboard updates its Hot 100 songs chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data collected in the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then titled “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”. The first Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the chart titled “Week of January 17, 2026” for a data collection reference period of January 2-8, 2026. The final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the Chart titled “Week of January 9, 2027” for a data collection reference period of December 25-31, 2026.

Updates or revisions made within this market’s timeframe to the #1-ranked song on previously published Billboard Hot 100 charts will be considered; however, such updates will not disqualify a previously published Billboard Hot 100 #1 song from counting. If a Billboard Hot 100 #1 song is revised after initial publication, both the originally published #1 song and the revised #1 song will count for this market. Updates or revisions made after the release of the final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be the weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs charts published each week at https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/ and through other official Billboard channels.

eventMetadata.context_description: Olivia Rodrigo's "Drop Dead" debuted at #1 on the Billboard Hot 100 for the week of May 2, 2026, fueled by massive streaming and sales from her latest single release, solidifying her as the newest chart-topper this year. Joining 2026 #1 artists like Ella Langley (seven non-consecutive weeks with "Choosin' Texas," currently #2), Taylor Swift (two songs), Bruno Mars, Harry Styles, Bad Bunny, BTS, and a Mariah Carey holiday re-entry, the market reflects strong country-pop crossovers and K-pop momentum amid shifting radio airplay and platform algorithms. With eight months left, traders eye May album drops from Chris Brown and others, plus weekly tracking updates, as debut strategies and viral TikTok traction could propel fresh contenders like Sabrina Carpenter or Post Malone to the summit.

markets.question: LoL: LUA Gaming vs Barça eSports - Game 1 Winner
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between LUA Gaming and Barça eSports in the LES Regular Season, initially scheduled for April 30 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "LUA Gaming" if LUA Gaming win Game 1 against Barça eSports.

This market will resolve to "Barça eSports" if Barça eSports win Game 1 against LUA Gaming.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 1 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 1. 

If Game 1 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: LUA Gaming vs Barça eSports (BO3) - LES Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between LUA Gaming and Barça eSports in the LES Regular Season, initially scheduled for April 30 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "LUA Gaming" if LUA Gaming win the match against Barça eSports.

This market will resolve to "Barça eSports" if Barça eSports win the match against LUA Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barça eSports sits third in LES 2026 Spring regular season standings at 2-1 (5-3 games), bolstered by a recent 2-1 win over UCAM Esports Club on April 22 and 2-0 sweep of UB Alma Mater on April 16, fueling their top-4 playoff push amid a two-series win streak. LUA Gaming, conversely, anchors the bottom at 0-3 (0-6 games), swept 0-2 by elite foes including Movistar KOI Fénix on April 23 and Heretics Academy earlier, exposing macro and execution woes in a winless skid. Head-to-head history tilts toward Barça, with stable rosters—Barça's Koldo jungle and Legolas ADC versus LUA's Pegaso and Kaii—setting up a pivotal BO3 where LUA seeks a breakout amid trash talk from ADC Kaii1.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 37°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/in/lucknow/VILK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: India Meteorological Department (IMD) forecasts a maximum temperature of 37°C in Lucknow on May 1 under partly cloudy skies with spells of rain or thundershowers, driving trader consensus toward moderate outcomes while favoring cooler readings. The 48% implied probability for 34°C or below reflects post-heatwave relief, as severe conditions peaking at 43.2°C on April 27 have eased with thunderstorms and 3-5°C drops from increased convective activity and cloud cover since April 28. Pre-monsoon moisture from western disturbances suppresses peaks below May climatological averages near 41°C, though model uncertainty persists amid evolving forecast guidance. Watch IMD's daily bulletins for refined ensemble projections ahead of resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: West Bromwich Albion's 63% implied probability reflects trader consensus on their superior Championship standing (21st with 51 points after a recent two-point deduction) and unbeaten run in six matches (D-W-W-D-D-D), contrasting Sheffield Wednesday's bottom-table position (24th, already relegated in February with a record-early drop) and winless home form (0-7-15). Both sides grapple with injuries—Owls missing Iké Ugbo, Di'Shon Bernard, Liam Cooper, and others; Baggies without Josh Maja (ankle), Jed Wallace (doubtful leg), and Mikey Johnston (surgery)—yet West Brom's head-to-head edge (8 wins to Wednesday's 4 in recent H2H) and depth position them as clear favorites despite poor away record, with a draw at 20.5% viable in a low-stakes finale for the hosts.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the PA-06 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the PA-06 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Anysphere (Cursor) IPO before 2027?
markets.description:

The IPO refers to the first sale of stock by the listed company to the public on any recognized stock exchange.

This market will resolve early if the listed company completes an IPO by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

Databricks lags at 25% pending S-1 progress, as competitive AI dynamics and regulatory scrutiny loom; watch Q2 earnings and filings for sentiment shifts in this crowded tech unicorn pipeline.

markets.question: Will UBS or any of its underwriting affiliates serve as the lead underwriter in SpaceX’s initial public offering?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the bank that serves as the lead underwriter in the initial public offering of SpaceX.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or SpaceX completes an initial public offering without a designated lead underwriter, this market will resolve to “Other.”

If multiple banks are identified as lead underwriters, this market will resolve according to the primary lead underwriter. If the hierarchy between them is unclear, this market will resolve once it is conclusively evident which bank is the primary lead underwriter, for example, through the order in which the banks are listed in the underwriting section of SpaceX’s final initial public offering prospectus, once released.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official disclosures from SpaceX. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Lead Bank in SpaceX’s IPO?

If multiple banks are identified as lead underwriters, this market will resolve according to the primary lead underwriter. If the hierarchy between them is unclear, this market will resolve once it is conclusively evident which bank is the primary lead underwriter, for example, through the order in which the banks are listed in the underwriting section of SpaceX’s final initial public offering prospectus, once released.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official disclosures from SpaceX. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket positions Morgan Stanley as the frontrunner at 40.5% implied probability to serve as lead bank for SpaceX's anticipated "Project Apex" IPO, driven by its longstanding ties to Elon Musk—including veteran banker Michael Grimes' February return to the firm—and early reports naming it a top contender among the syndicate. Recent April developments, including SpaceX's virtual banker meeting on April 6 outlining a $75 billion raise at up to $1.75 trillion valuation, prospectus release in late May, and June roadshow, confirmed Morgan Stanley alongside Bank of America (16.6%) and Goldman Sachs (14.5%) as senior bookrunners in a 21-bank group, fueling jockeying for top billing amid retail allocation talks via E*Trade. Lower odds for JPMorgan and others reflect their supporting roles, with resolution hinging on final S-1 designations.

markets.question: Le Mans FC vs. Stade de Reims: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between Le Mans FC and Stade de Reims, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Le Mans FC and Stade de Reims combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue2.fr. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Le Mans FC vs. Stade de Reims - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 2 game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Le Mans FC, entrenched in third place on the Ligue 2 table with 15 wins and robust home form (eight victories at Stade Marie-Marvingt), host fourth-placed Stade de Reims on May 2 in a pivotal promotion six-pointer. Le Mans boast momentum from recent triumphs including a 4-0 rout of Pau FC on April 6 and a 4-3 comeback at Amiens, bolstering their clean-sheet streak. Reims remain competitive but stumbled to a 2-2 draw at Laval last week, compounded by off-field disruption from armed fan threats at their training ground five days ago potentially impacting morale. Reims dominate head-to-head (unbeaten in six, including February's 3-0 Coupe de France win), though Le Mans contend without long-term absentee Jean Vercruysse (cruciate ligament tear).

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Hong Kong be 21°C on April 30?

markets.question: Will Ted Cruz post 200+ posts from April 28 to May 5, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Ted Cruz (@tedcruz), posts on X between April 28, 12:00 PM ET and May 5, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects high uncertainty in short-range forecasts for Moscow's unusually cold May 1 high temperature, with market-implied odds tightly clustered at 37% for both 8°C and 9°C amid a broader 35-37% spread across 6-10°C outcomes—well below the historical average of 16°C. This positioning stems from a persistent Arctic air mass over European Russia, reinforced by recent northerly winds and precipitation as shown in the latest ECMWF and GFS model runs over the past 48 hours, which project highs of 7-9°C under overcast skies and light rain. Differentiating factors include ensemble variations in cloud cover timing and frontal passage speed: clearer afternoon scenarios favor 9-10°C, while prolonged overcast conditions tilt toward 6-7°C. New 00Z forecasts from NOAA and ECMWF, due within hours, could sharpen this divergence.

markets.question: Will Valtteri Bottas be the 2026 F1 Drivers' Champion?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed driver that finishes 1st in the driver standings for the 2026 F1 season.

This market will resolve as soon as the official results of the final scheduled race of the 2026 F1 season are known.

If multiple drivers tie for first place in the drivers standings, this market will resolve according to the tiebreak procedure used by F1 to determine the 2026 F1 Drivers’ champion.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed driver to win the 2026 F1 Drivers Championship based on the rules of F1 (e.g., they are mathematically eliminated from contention), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the F1 season is permanently canceled or has not been completed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Formula 1.

Miami GP looms as the next test of Mercedes' active aero edge.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the SC-02 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the SC-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Will the Fed’s lower bound reach 0.5% or lower before 2027?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Federal Reserve held the federal funds target range steady at 3.50%-3.75% following its April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, reflecting persistent inflation pressures with March CPI rising 3.3% year-over-year and a resilient labor market showing 4.3% unemployment alongside 178,000 nonfarm payroll gains. The March dot plot indicated a median projection of 3.4% by year-end 2026, implying trader consensus for one 25-basis-point cut amid balanced risks, though war-related inflation risks have delayed easing expectations to late 2026. Polymarket traders price high implied probabilities for the lower bound dipping to 3.25% or below before December 31, 2026, backed by $1.4 million in volume. Key catalysts include April CPI on May 12, nonfarm payrolls early May, and the June 16-17 FOMC.

markets.question: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)
markets.description:

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump's tie be another color on April 29, 2026?
markets.description:

The color will be determined based solely on the first publicly available photo or video of the appearance. Reporting of the tie color without photos or videos will not be considered. Subsequent publication of other photos or videos, including those taken earlier, will not affect the resolution.

For the tie to be considered predominantly blue or red, its primary color must be a shade of blue or red, though it may feature other colors as part of a pattern.

events.title: Donald Trump tie color on April 29?
events.description:
This market will resolve based on the predominant color of the tie worn by Donald Trump during his first public appearance during which he wears a tie on the specified date (ET).

The color will be determined based solely on the first publicly available photo or video of the appearance. Reporting of the tie color without photos or videos will not be considered. Subsequent publication of other photos or videos, including those taken earlier, will not affect the resolution.

For the tie to be considered predominantly blue or red, its primary color must be a shade of blue or red, though it may feature other colors as part of a pattern. 

This tie would count as "Blue": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-blue-5ywRT5OXfn-5.jpg

This tie would count as "Red": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-red-a7ObxtpGQcrR.jpg

The following tie has no distinguishable predominant color, and thus would resolve to "Other": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-other-Q8aIgOP7wFs1.jpg

If Donald Trump does not have any public appearance on the specified date, does not wear a tie, or if it is a color not listed among the strike options, the market will resolve to “Other.”

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight competition between Red (30%) and Other (30%), with Blue trailing at 20%, driven by President Trump's signature power-red ties clashing against his recent diversification into unconventional shades like metallic purple—seen at February's Board of Peace meeting and yesterday's White House beehive tour with Melania's matching purple hat. The ongoing state visit by King Charles III and Queen Camilla elevates tonight's formal state dinner, where viral footage captures Trump in a crisp white bowtie, bolstering Other as a frontrunner for high-profile imagery. Daytime public appearances could still swing toward red, heightening uncertainty until confirmed photos resolve the market amid buzzing social media speculation.

markets.question: Will the Utah Mammoth win the Western Conference?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the Western Conference during the 2025-26 NHL Playoffs.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the Western Conference (e.g., elimination from the playoffs), the relevant market will resolve immediately to “No.”

If the 2025-26 NHL season is permanently canceled or the playoffs have not been completed by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other.”

eventMetadata.context_description: Colorado Avalanche lead trader consensus at 49.5% implied probability to claim the Western Conference title after sweeping the Los Angeles Kings 4-0 in the first round, capped by a 5-1 Game 4 win on April 26, with trade deadline additions like Brent Burns delivering key contributions amid strong goaltending from Scott Wedgewood. Vegas Golden Knights sit at 13.9% following Shea Theodore's overtime winner in a 5-4 Game 4 victory to tie Utah Mammoth 2-2, leveraging playoff experience and home-ice in Game 5. Minnesota Wild's 11.5% reflects their 3-2 series edge over Dallas Stars after a 4-2 Game 5 win on April 28 despite Mats Zuccarello's absence, fueled by Matt Boldy's overtime heroics earlier. Ducks (6.4%) and Oilers (7.0%) remain competitive with Anaheim up 3-2, while Stars (6.5%) and Utah (5.1%) face elimination risks. Avalanche await the Central Division winner with rest advantage.

markets.question: Will EUR/USD hit 1.35 (High) in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Investing.com high price (“H”) for any EUR/USD hourly candle for an hour on or before the listed end date (ET) is equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Data for a given candle will be considered finalized once the next candle appears on the specified graph. The last trading day of a given week will be considered finalized once the market closes on that day, typically at 5 PM ET on Friday.

This market will resolve as soon as any finalized EUR/USD hourly candle high price is equal to or above the listed price, or once the final hourly candle in the specified period is finalized. A candle starting at 11:00 PM ET on a given date will be considered to be on that date.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on information from the “H” figure located at the top of the EUR/USD Streaming Chart on Investing.com for the specified currency pair (e.g., https://www.investing.com/currencies/eur-usd-chart).

eventMetadata.context_description: EUR/USD hovers near 1.170, per the ECB's April 29 reference rate of 1.1706, reflecting trader consensus on persistent US-Eurozone policy divergence amid sticky inflation. The Fed's April 28-29 FOMC held the federal funds rate at 3.5%-3.75%, signaling caution after March US CPI rose 3.3% year-over-year, while Eurozone inflation ticked up to 2.6% y/y in March from ECB's steady March 19 stance. Recent USD strength stems from Middle East tensions and softer German sentiment, compressing rate differentials. Key catalysts include May CPI data (US release May 12), ECB signals, and June FOMC, with implied paths suggesting potential swings toward 1.15-1.20 by year-end.

markets.question: Will Microsoft (MSFT) close above $435 end of April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) on the final trading day of April 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the final trading day of the month is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance — specifically, the Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MSFT/history, published under "Historical Prices."

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance.

eventMetadata.context_description: Microsoft (MSFT) shares closed at $429.25 on April 28, 2026, amid heightened volatility with a year-to-date decline of roughly 15% but recent monthly gains exceeding 10% as traders position ahead of fiscal Q3 earnings due after market close today. Azure cloud growth and AI investments remain core drivers, with consensus analyst estimates targeting EPS of $4.07 and average price targets near $570, implying significant upside potential. Options pricing suggests a 6% post-earnings move in either direction, positioning trader sentiment for a reaction on April 30's close—the market resolution date. Key focus: revenue beats in intelligent cloud segment versus elevated capital expenditures and competitive pressures from hyperscalers.

markets.question: Will Kael Weston be the Democratic nominee for UT-01?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Democratic Party to contest the UT-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Democratic primary will take place on June 23, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Former U.S. Rep. Ben McAdams leads trader consensus at 60% implied probability for Utah's 1st Congressional District Democratic primary on June 23, driven by his fundraising dominance—holding as much cash on hand as the rest of the field combined—name recognition from his 2019-2021 service, and a March Data for Progress poll showing 36% support among likely primary voters. Nate Blouin's 26.5% reflects progressive enthusiasm as a state senator criticizing McAdams' moderate record on issues like minimum wage and reproductive rights, amid recent attack ads and debates. At the April 26 Utah Democratic convention, McAdams captured 40% on the first ballot before losing ranked-choice endorsement to newcomer Liban Mohamed, but traders view the delegate-heavy event as left-skewed versus the broader primary electorate, positioning McAdams' base for a plurality win in the newly drawn blue-leaning district. Lower odds for Brian King, Caroline Gleich, and others highlight their limited polling and visibility.

markets.question: Will the Fed’s lower bound reach 1.25% or lower before 2027?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Federal Reserve held the federal funds target range steady at 3.50%-3.75% following its April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, reflecting persistent inflation pressures with March CPI rising 3.3% year-over-year and a resilient labor market showing 4.3% unemployment alongside 178,000 nonfarm payroll gains. The March dot plot indicated a median projection of 3.4% by year-end 2026, implying trader consensus for one 25-basis-point cut amid balanced risks, though war-related inflation risks have delayed easing expectations to late 2026. Polymarket traders price high implied probabilities for the lower bound dipping to 3.25% or below before December 31, 2026, backed by $1.4 million in volume. Key catalysts include April CPI on May 12, nonfarm payrolls early May, and the June 16-17 FOMC.

markets.question: Will DeepSeek have the #3 AI model at the end of April 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the third-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on April 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies third place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors Anthropic at 98.6% implied probability for holding the #3 AI model spot on the Arena.ai Text Arena leaderboard (Style Control On) as of April 29, 2026, driven by its Claude family dominating the top ranks: Claude Opus 4.7 Thinking at #1 (1503 Elo), Opus 4.6 Thinking at #2 (1502), and Opus 4.6 at #3 (1497)—a 4-point lead over #4 (also Anthropic) and 6 points over Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview at #5. Recent Anthropic releases, including Opus 4.7's strong showings in code and expert benchmarks from mid-April, have solidified this positioning amid crowdsourced battles exceeding millions of votes. With resolution at April 30 noon ET, realistic challenges include a last-minute OpenAI GPT-5.5 update, Google preview surge, or voting volatility shifting Elo scores by 5+ points.
